scripts.preios: pnpm run patch:expo-modules-jsi && pnpm run sync:ios-permissions
scripts.prebuild:ios:dev: APP_VARIANT=dev EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=dev expo prebuild --platform ios && pnpm run sync:ios-permissions
scripts.prebuild:ios:dev:clean: APP_VARIANT=dev EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=dev expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && pnpm run sync:ios-permissions
scripts.prebuild:ios:prod: APP_VARIANT=prod EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=prod expo prebuild --platform ios && pnpm run sync:ios-permissions
scripts.prebuild:ios:prod:clean: APP_VARIANT=prod EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=prod expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && pnpm run sync:ios-permissions
scripts.eas:build:ios: APP_VARIANT=prod EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=prod eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:build:ios:dev: APP_VARIANT=dev EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=dev eas build --platform ios --profile testflight-dev
scripts.eas:build:ios:local: APP_VARIANT=prod EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=prod eas build --platform ios --profile production --local
scripts.eas:submit:ios: APP_VARIANT=prod EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=prod eas submit --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:ios:dev: APP_VARIANT=dev EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=dev eas submit --platform ios --profile testflight-dev
